Author: Josh
UsageNotes: This template provides an illustration of utilizing SQL_CLR to print SSRS reports, although it should be noted that this process is not fully functional.
ImplementationNotes: In the stored procedure Prescript_Example_PrintSsrsReport, the clr_ReportPrint is employed to print a SSRS report. Ensure the printer is accessible by the SQL server.
Name: EXAMPLE_PRINT_SSRSREPORT
Description:
EXAMPLE_PRINT_SSRSREPORT

This template provides an illustration of utilizing SQL_CLR to print SSRS reports, although it should be noted that this process is not fully functional.

In the stored procedure Prescript_Example_PrintSsrsReport, the clr_ReportPrint is employed to print a SSRS report. Ensure the printer is accessible by the SQL server.
